name: PFNavigation
description: Stable circulation model for movement through the product environment.
responsibility: Provide stable movement through the product environment.

requirements: Users must understand where they are.
Active location must be programmatically clear.
Keyboard navigation must support predictable traversal.

composition_rules: Users must understand where they are.
Do not mix unrelated navigation models in one view.
anti_patterns: mixing primary and unrelated secondary navigation in the same pattern
using navigation as a dumping ground for unrelated actions
